event: Homenaje a A. Fleming — Abstract Sculpture
description: A photograph of an abstract granite sculpture against a clear blue sky. The sculpture consists of interlocking rectangular and cubic stone blocks stacked vertically on a large base, forming a cross-like or anthropomorphic shape. In the background, a green hill with a monument or cross on its summit is visible, along with a coastal town below. The granite is light-colored and rough-textured.
